description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating the front and side facades. The exterior is finished in a dark, likely composite or concrete material, contrasted by light-colored trim and a spacious balcony on the upper floor. The house features a prominent front patio with palm trees and a driveway leading to a carport on the side. The ground floor appears to have an open-plan living area, visible through the expansive glass panels, while the upper floor includes private rooms with access to the balcony. The landscaping includes several palm trees and a fenced-in yard, enhancing the contemporary, tropical aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a balcony, and a carport, surrounded by palm trees and a fenced yard. The design features clean lines and a dark exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, balcony, patio, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and a single large window on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view with a fenced yard, extensive glass facade, and more palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony, additional windows, and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, open patio, and minimalistic landscaping with palm trees.
